---
name: Content quality and discoverability guidelines
description: Use the Arm content editor skill for clarity, Arm-specific framing, accessibility, and link quality. Use the SEO/GEO/AEO review skill for search discoverability and AI-readable structure.
applyTo: "content/learning-paths/**/*.md,content/install-guides/**/*.md"
---

Content quality guidance now lives in `.github/skills/arm-content-editor/references/content-quality.md`.

For review and editing workflows, use `.github/skills/arm-content-editor/SKILL.md`.
For focused SEO, GEO, AEO, and AI-agent discoverability review, use `.github/skills/seo-geo-aeo-review/SKILL.md`.
